steps.title: Use the example's purpose
steps.content: The passage first states that conservation initiatives relying on natural features or processes can help address ecosystem challenges. The blueback salmon logjam project is then used as an example of that broader point.

steps.title: Avoid too narrow claims
steps.content: Choice A shifts the focus to collaboration. Choice C focuses only on logjams and salmon rather than the broader conservation principle. Choice D adds an unsupported comparison with non-nature-based methods. The answer is B.
